summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 1 warning, 14 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 bin/lib/flows.mjs:100 — `gateOutput` is interpolated raw inside a triple-backtick block; an adversary controlling test stdout can break out of the fence and inject instructions into 6 reviewer agents launched with `--permission-mode bypassPermissions` (run.mjs:337). Escape nested backticks or use a randomized fence delimiter.

No 🔴 or 🟡 findings. Synthesis-header change is ~30 lines, single-purpose, no new abstractions, no config knobs, no dead code. Tests (562/562 pass) verify header shape, ordering, and non-reparsability. None of the four veto categories apply. Eval at `.team/features/multi-perspective-code-review/tasks/task-5/eval-simplicity.md`.
